Remark: ?sdemir, one of OYAK Mining Metallurgy companies, is the third largest integrated iron and steel plant in Turkey by date of establishment and the largest integrated iron and steel plant by long product production capacity. With its 3.5 million tonnes/year hot rolling capacity, which was commissioned in 2008, ?sdemir is Turkey's only and largest integrated facility producing long and flat products at the same time.

Acciaierie d'Italia is the first Italian steel group. The Taranto plant is the sole in Italy with integrated cycle and is fed by raw materials through 4 lease facilities in the Taranto harbor. The fleet, managed by ADI Servizi Marittimi and boasting 1 cargo vessel, 4 pusher boats and 8 barges, is also used for transport services to the Genoa site and from there to Novi Ligure, Racconigi, Legnago and Paderno Dugnano.
